warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
Banded Lat Stretch
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press

strength.name: Clean Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * 3 count to knee
* Focus on hip pop & Triple Extension
* Shrug and let elbows float | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3

strength.name: Clean
strength.description:
4x3 | * If you catch high, squat it
* Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E3MOM 15min
BUILD 1 Sets
00:00 3 @ 65%
HOLD 4 Sets
03:00 3 @ 75%
06:00 3 @ 75%
09:00 3 @ 75%
12:00 3 @ 75%

strength.name: Clean complex
strength.description:
1x1 | MLInvitational 26.2 Part A | Today's Complex
in 5 Mins find your max load for the complex
1 Clean
1 Hang Clean
1 Shoulder to Overhead
Clean can be power or full
5 min cap - then 1 min rest

metcon.name: MLInvitational 26.2 Part B
metcon.description:
1-2-3-4-5-6-7-8 for time of
Front Squats
Chest to Bar
Scaled - Ring Rows & 50/35kg
Rx - Chest to Bar & 60/40kg
Rx+ Muscle Up & 70/47.5kg
8 min Cap

hypertrophy.reasoning: Balance quad and shoulder dominance; build pulling capacity and posterior chain resilience without competing with CNS fatigue.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Strength: Clean complex, 1 by 1. Metcon: MLInvitational 26.2 Part B. For Time, 8 min cap: Front Squats, Chest to Bar. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, biceps.
